name: Hard Rock Cafe Baked Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups baked potatoes, peeled and cubed
1/4 cup green onions, white part only, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop cooked bacon and reserve.
2. Cook onions in remaining drippings over medium-high heat until transparent, about 3 minutes.
3. Add flour, stirring to prevent lumps. Cook for 3-5 minutes until the mixture just begins to run golden.
4. Gradually add chicken stock, whisking to prevent lumps, until the liquid thickens.
5. Reduce heat to simmer and add potatoes, cream, chopped bacon, parsley, garlic, basil, salt, pepper sauce, and black pepper.
6. Simmer for 10 minutes; do not allow to boil.
7. Add grated cheese and green onions. Heat until the cheese melts smoothly.
8. Garnish each serving as desired with chopped bacon, grated cheese, and chopped parsley.
9. Makes 2 quarts, about 8 servings.
